releaseHighlights.title: Astro Release Highlights
releaseHighlights.summary: Recent Astro updates include `astro@7.0.6` fixing a false deprecation warning and `create-astro@5.2.2` improving proxy support. For developers, `@astrojs/ts-plugin@1.10.10` addresses an issue with "Go To References" in TypeScript files, and `@astrojs/solid-js@7.0.1` resolves an incorrect claim for Solid.js integration.

firstTimeContributorShoutOuts.title: First-Time Contributor Shout-Outs!
firstTimeContributorShoutOuts.summary: A huge welcome and thank you to our first-time contributors! jan-kubica helped fix a background dev server issue in monorepos. dupontcyborg addressed a language server security vulnerability. FrancoKaddour improved Svelte 5 component detection for Solid.js integration. chatman-media fixed a route generator bug. We appreciate your valuable contributions!

editorialOutline.subject: Astro Weekly: Latest Updates & Launch Week Incoming
editorialOutline.previewText: Get the scoop on recent Astro releases, welcome new contributors, and mark your calendars for Astro Launch Week.
editorialOutline.intro: Welcome to your weekly Astro update. This edition brings you the latest releases from June 28 - July 5, celebrates our newest contributors, and looks ahead to Launch Week (July 2026).
editorialOutline.closing: That's all for this week's Astro updates. Thank you for being a part of our community. We look forward to seeing you at Launch Week and next week's edition!

qaReport.summary: The newsletter draft is well-grounded and complete, aligning perfectly with all provided briefs. No missing information, ungrounded claims, or weaker sections were identified.
checks: No additional QA issues were flagged.
